agriculture.title: Dairy & Fodder Farming
agriculture.subTitle: Milk the Potential: Invest in the Future of Dairy
agriculture.description: An investment opportunity to develop fully integrated dairy farms in Sri Lanka with dedicated fodder cultivation. The project targets the growing local dairy market exceeding USD 250 million annually while enabling export opportunities. Designed to modernize Sri Lanka’s dairy and livestock sector, the initiative supports productivity improvements, consistent milk supply, and value addition across the dairy value chain.
keyHighlights: Intergrated milk production and fodder cultivation

tourism.title: Theme Park - Nuwara Eliya
tourism.subTitle: Sri Lanka’s Next Iconic Hill-Country Leisure Destination
tourism.description: A US$30 million world-class theme park on 10.9 acres. Featuring thrilling rides, family zones and landscaped gardens. Designed in three seamless phases, thispremier hill-country attraction offers year-round fun, luxury stays, and unmatched hospitality in Sri Lankaʼs most scenic destination.

tourism.title: Diyawanna Frolic Island Recreational Hub
tourism.subTitle: Sri Lanka’s Next Iconic Urban Leisure Asset
tourism.description: The Diyawanna Frolic Island Recreational Hub is a USD 115 million the project is structured under two distinct investment option models, offering flexible participation opportunities for strategic investors across development phases and asset components.

tourism.title: Heritage Kandy Hotel
tourism.subTitle: A Landmark Hospitality Investment in Sri Lanka’s Cultural Capital
tourism.description: The Heritage Kandy Hotel is a USD 75 million investment on a 3-acre prime leasehold in central Kandy. This heritage-compliant 5-star development features 85 luxury keys, including Deluxe Rooms, Heritage Suites, Pool Villas, and Presidential Residences, all within a two-story pavilion design respecting sacred height limits. Offering a 99- year lease, it delivers a unique, protected luxury asset in Sri Lanka's UNESCO cultural capital.
keyHighlights: 85 luxury keys including suites, villas and presidential residences
Two-storey pavilion design respecting sacred height regulations
Located in UNESCO World Heritage tourism hub
Full BOI investment incentives & fiscal concessions
100% foreign ownership permitted with full repatriation of capital & profits

tourism.title: Cruise Line
tourism.subTitle: Asia’s Central Hub for Cruise Tourism Growth
tourism.description: Discover a US$80 million investment opportunity to launch a world-class, high-occupancy premium cruise line around Sri Lanka, linking Colombo, Galle, Trincomalee, and Jaffna, capturing the spirit of island luxury and adventure while leveraging BOI incentives and rising inbound tourism for exceptional growth and enduring returns. With curated luxury itineraries and unforgettable coastal experiences, this project is poised to become a flagship offering in Sri Lankaʼs booming tourism sector.
keyHighlights: Fleet deployment and onboard hospitality ecosystem

tourism.title: Cinema City - Integrated Film & Studio Tourism Hub
tourism.subTitle: Sri Lanka’s Next Global Creative Economy Anchor
tourism.description: A US$119 million investment to develop an integrated film production and studio tourism asset, positioned to serve Asia’s rapidly expanding OTT and film markets. The project combines cost-efficient production infrastructure, diversified tourism revenue, and BOI-backed incentives to deliver stable, long-term returns.
keyHighlights: Asia’s integrated film & studio tourism hub
Core production infrastructure and studio facilities

urban.title: Mixed Development
urban.subTitle: Live, work, shop, and play in one place — asia’s top investment opportunity.
urban.description: This world-class mixed-use development project to be designed to create a vibrant, integrated community, combining residential, commercial, retail, and leisure spaces. With modern homes, offices, shopping destinations, and recreational amenities, it offers structured investment opportunities with attractive return.

urban.title: Residential Apartment
urban.subTitle: Building colombo’s next residential landmark
urban.description: A new benchmark in urban luxury: Two 42-story towers rising on a 99-year UDA lease in the heart of Colombo 10. This USD 65 million development delivers 420 meticulously designed residences within a complete lifestyle ecosystem, all set in a prime and highly connected location. Unlock exceptional value backed by powerful BOI incentives, positioning this landmark project as a compelling opportunity for discerning investors.

ict.title: Techno Parks
ict.subTitle: Invest in Sri Lanka’s Emerging Technology Capital
ict.description: Sri Lanka offers compelling investment opportunities through the proposed Techno Parks in Kurunegala and Galle under the BOI framework, allowing 100% foreign ownership. Positioned in strategically important regions, these projects invite investors to develop world-class technology and innovation hubs supported by modern digital infrastructure, cost advantages, full profit repatriation, and access to a growing skilled workforce making them highly attractive destinations for global IT and knowledge based enterprises.
keyHighlights: R&D innovation and product engineering labs

education.title: Sooriyawewa University Town Southern Province (SUT)
education.subTitle: Sri Lanka’s First Integrated University Town
education.description: International-standard University Town attracting global education providers, research institutions, and investors, with integrated academics, living, innovation, andBOI-backed incentives.

education.title: Keragala University Town Western Province (KUT)
education.subTitle: Five-University Master Planned Campus
education.description: Keragala University Town is a world-class education ecosystem designed to accommodate five leading universities on a 125- acre master planned campus. With shared student housing, faculty residences, laboratories, and modern amenities, this project offers structured investment opportunities with attractive returns.

transport.title: Logistic Center in Colombo Port
transport.subTitle: The Nexus of Colombo’s Maritime Future
transport.description: The Logistic Center in the area between Colombo International Container Terminals (CICT) & Colombo West International Terminal (CWIT) is a strategically positioned, port-centric development project located within the Port of Colombo. Spanning approximately 10 Acres with an estimated investment of USD 300 million, the project is designed to enhance cargo efficiency and streamline container handling through modern, integrated logistics infrastructure. It offers investors an opportunity to establish a presence near the operational core of some of Colombo’s high-demand container terminals.
keyHighlights: Located between CICT and CWIT terminals
Strategic position on East–West shipping route
Close proximity to Sri Lanka's Western region

transport.title: Logistic & Freight Forwarding Services - MRIA
transport.subTitle: Sri Lanka’s Next Strategic Logistics Frontier
transport.description: The Logistics and Freight Forwarding Services Project at Mattala International Airport is a strategically positioned aviation-linked development project located in Sri Lanka’s development project located in Sri Lanka’s southern region. Spanning approximately 101.3 Acres, the project is envisioned to support air cargo operations, freight forwarding, warehousing, and value-added logistics services through modern, integrated infrastructure. It offers investors an opportunity to establish a presence within a growing international airport and in close proximity to a growing harbour, along with seamless connectivity to regional and global trade.
keyHighlights: Integrated air cargo and freight forwarding infrastructure
Strategic gateway connecting maritime and aviation trade routes

transport.title: Integrated Logistic Fulfillment Center
transport.subTitle: Invest in Sri Lanka’s Next-Generation Logistics Gateway
transport.description: Development of a 13-acre integrated fulfillment logistics center in Ekala, Gampaha featuring Grade A warehousing, automated storage systems, cold chain facilities, e-commerce fulfillment centers, and cross-docking operations. Strategically located near Colombo Port and Bandaranaike International Airport to support growing demand from 3PL, retail and e-commerce sectors.
keyHighlights: Cold chain and e-commerce fulfillment facilities
Strategic location near Colombo Port and BIA Airport
Modern logistics hub serving retail and 3PL sectors

transport.title: Multi-Storey Logistic Hub - Bloemendhal
transport.subTitle: Asia’s Smart Gateway for Port-Centric Logistic Growth
transport.description: The Bloemendhal Logistic Centre, near the Port of Colombo, is a government- backed project to ease container congestion with modernized cargo handling operations. This 5.5-Acre multi-storey hub proposed to be developed with integrated port and airport access, offers investors a USD 50 million opportunity to tap South Asia’s busiest trade routes, backed by Board of Investment of Sri Lanka (BOI) incentives and strong long-term growth potential.
keyHighlights: Port-centric logistic hub near Colombo Port
Multi-storey cargo handling and warehouse infrastructure
Colombo Port's strategic location on East-West shipping route

aviation.title: West Container Terminal II - Colombo Port
aviation.subTitle: Empowering global trade from the heart of the Indian Ocean
aviation.description: The West Container Terminal II (WCT-II) at the Port of Colombo is a landmark public-private partnership (PPP) project that underscores Sri Lanka’s commitment to expanding its maritime and logistics capabilities. The project is set to significantly enhance the port’s capacity and operational efficiency, strengthening its role in global shipping networks and regional trade. As one of the most ambitious developments within Colombo Port’s expansion program, WCT-II offers investors a strategic opportunity to participate in a long-term infrastructure partnership that reinforces Sri Lanka’s position as a vital link in international maritime connectivity.
keyHighlights: Strategic position along the main  East-West trade corridor

aviation.title: Aircraft MRO Facility - Mattala International Airport
aviation.subTitle: Where Public Vision Meets Private Aviation Expertise
aviation.description: The Mattala Aircraft Maintenance, Repair and Overhaul (MRO) facility is a government-backed initiative designed to position Sri Lanka as a competitive regional hub for aviation maintenance services. Located at Mattala International Airport in Southern Sri Lanka, the project will support both narrow-body and wide-body aircraft maintenance operations across a land area exceeding 66 acres. Developed through a Public–Private Partnership (PPP) framework and supported by BOI incentives, the project offers investors a long-term opportunity to serve the fast-growing Asia-Pacific aviation market while delivering sustainable returns.
keyHighlights: Aircraft maintenance hub for narrow- and wide-body aircraft
Strategic location connecting Southeast Asia, Middle East and Australia
Government-backed project with BOI investment incentives
Opportunity to serve high-growth Asia-Pacific region

manufacturing.title: Sustainable Textile Hub
manufacturing.subTitle: Integrated Textile Manufacturing Platform
manufacturing.description: A unique opportunity to establish five state-of-the-art textile manufacturing plants within the Textile Manufacturing Zone located in the Eastern Province, each valued at USD 65 million, positioning the zone as a premier integrated textile hub in Asia. Leveraging Sri Lanka’s USD 5 billion apparel industry, the project will strengthen backward linkages and reduce reliance on imported inputs through vertical integration—from fabric processing and finishing to value-added textile production. The facilities will not only cater to the domestic market but also create significant opportunities for textile exports. With ESG-compliant production and BOI-backed incentives, the initiative will enhance competitiveness, generate regional employment, and deliver sustainable long-term returns while deepening value addition in Sri Lanka’s textile sector.

manufacturing.title: API Manufacturing
manufacturing.subTitle: A new benchmark for api manufacturing in south asia
manufacturing.description: The proposed API Manufacturing Plant is an USD 80 million BOI-facilitated investment aimed at establishing a world-class, WHO-GMP-ready API hub in Sri Lanka. Strategically located in a dedicated pharmaceutical zone in the southern part of the country, the project offers long-term land security, dedicated utilities, and direct access to ports and airports. Optimized for high-value exports under the China-Plus-One supply chain strategy, the initiative presents a strong opportunity for pharmaceutical manufacturing and global market integration.

manufacturing.title: EV Assembling Hub
manufacturing.subTitle: South Asia’s Gateway to EV Assembly
manufacturing.description: The proposed Electric Vehicle (EV) Assembling Plant is a transformative, high-value foreign-direct- investment-led industrial 100% export oriented project designed to position Sri Lanka as a primary manufacturing hub for green mobility in South Asia. Spanning over 70 acres within the Southern Industrial Zone, the facility will feature an annual production capacity of 25,000 EV Units/Annum, specifically targeting the burgeoning Right-Hand Drive (RHD) markets across ASEAN, South Asia with duty free access to India under FTA, and Middle Eastern markets.
keyHighlights: Dutyfree access to india under ISFTA

renewable.title: Pumped Storage Power Plant (PSPP)
renewable.subTitle: Powering Sri Lanka’s Renewable Future
renewable.description: A USD 700 million utility-scale pumped storage project commencing 2029.

renewable.title: Natural Gas Fired ICE Power Plant
renewable.subTitle: Driving Returns Through Clean Energy
renewable.description: A 200 MW natural gas-fired power plant commencing 2026.

renewable.title: Natural Gas Fired Aero-Derivative Gas Turbines
renewable.subTitle: Energizing Tomorrow, Delivering Strong Returns
renewable.description: A 130 MW high-efficiency gas turbine project commencing 2028.
